name: com.unitycoder.skingore
description:
SkinGore is a dynamic gore and injury decal system for animated, skinned meshes.

Features:
▪ Apply gore/injury decals to animated skinned meshes
▪ GPU-accelerated damage accumulation buffer
▪ Very performant even with many instances
▪ Supports blend shapes
▪ Transfer damage state to new renderers (e.g. ragdolls)

To add damage to a character, add a SkinGoreRenderer component and call SkinGoreRenderer.AddDamage() with a world space position, radius, and strength.

samples.description: Example scene with a mannequin demonstrating the gore system. Click on the mannequin to mutilate it!
